title: Japanese Era
text: Japanese Era Use this editor to define a Japanese era of the emperors, for use with Kanji. The traditional dating system in Japan as based on the reigns of the emperors. Uniface provides language setups for modern Japanese eras in libmsg.usys.xml . Table 1. Modern Japanese Eras Date Japanese Era (Kanji) Japanese Era (Western) 1868-1912 明治 Meiji 1912-1926 大正 Taishō 1926-1989 昭和 Shōwa 1989-2019 平成 Heisei 2019 to present 令和 Reiwa You can use this dialog to define the available eras for the application. Note: You must have the Kanji font available on your machine. Fields Begin Date —date on which the selected Japanese Era is to be applied. Era —Japanese Era for the current language setup. Related Links Language Setups A language setup is a collection of definitions that specify the texts and formatting of language-related data that may be visible in the user interface of a desktop application.
